comment: Airwindows TapeHack port. Drive into 11th-order Taylor sin, then output trim. Stateless, audibly aggressive.

params.name: Drive
params.comment: params[5]. Input gain 0..10x; clipped at +/-2.305929 before the sin polynomial.

params.name: Output
params.comment: params[6]. Output trim 0..0.9239x. Default 75 lands at ~0.69x to leave headroom.
